channel.title: 战况追踪 — Global Conflict Monitor
channel.description: 实时追踪全球主要冲突态势，多源聚合情报

item.title: [俄乌战争] SIBERIA → POLISH : Use conventional military force, not specified below (Poland)
item.description: GDELT Event: Use conventional military force, not specified below. Actors: SIBERIA / POLISH. Location: Poland. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 8 sources.

item.title: [俄乌战争] UKRAINE → IRAN : Use conventional military force, not specified below (Kyiv, Kyyiv, Misto, Ukraine)
item.description: GDELT Event: Use conventional military force, not specified below. Actors: UKRAINE / IRAN. Location: Kyiv, Kyyiv, Misto, Ukraine. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 2 sources.
